Diagrams
Source
Used by
Simple Type CVEnumMIMEType
Namespace urn:us:gov:ic:cvenum:mime:type
Annotations
(U) All currently valid media types from IANA (including deprecated types), DNI unique, and legacy. PERMISSIBLE VALUES The permissible values for this simple type are defined in the Controlled Value Enumeration: CVEnumMIMEType.xml
Diagram
Type union of(restriction of xsd:token, restriction of xsd:token)
Used by
Element MimeType
Attribute @mimeType
Source 
<xsd:simpleType name="CVEnumMIMEType">
  <xsd:annotation>
    <xsd:documentation>(U) All currently valid media types from IANA (including deprecated types), DNI unique, and legacy. PERMISSIBLE VALUES The permissible values for this simple type are defined in the Controlled Value Enumeration: CVEnumMIMEType.xml</xsd:documentation>
  </xsd:annotation>
  <xsd:union>
    <xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:restriction base="xsd:token">
        <xsd:pattern value="[A-Za-z0-9!#$&.+\-^_]{1,127}/[A-Za-z0-9!#$&.+\-^_]{1,127}">
          <xsd:annotation>
            <xsd:documentation>Media Type Wildcard</xsd:documentation>
          </xsd:annotation>
        </xsd:pattern>
      </xsd:restriction>
    </xsd:simpleType>
    <xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:restriction base="xsd:token">
        <xsd:enumeration value="application/1d-interleaved-parityfec">
          <xsd:annotation>
            <xsd:documentation>1d-interleaved-parityfec</xsd:documentation>
          </xsd:annotation>
        </xsd:enumeration>
        <xsd:enumeration value="application/3gpdash-qoe-report+xml">

        </xsd:enumeration>
        <xsd:enumeration value="audio/vnd.qcelp">
          <xsd:annotation>
            <xsd:documentation>vnd.qcelp - DEPRECATED in favor of audio/qcelp</xsd:documentation>
          </xsd:annotation>
        </xsd:enumeration>
        <xsd:enumeration value="message/news">
          <xsd:annotation>
            <xsd:documentation>news - OBSOLETED by RFC5537</xsd:documentation>
          </xsd:annotation>

        <xsd:enumeration value="message/vnd.si.simp">
          <xsd:annotation>
            <xsd:documentation>vnd.si.simp - OBSOLETED by request</xsd:documentation>
          </xsd:annotation>
        </xsd:enumeration>
        <xsd:enumeration value="text/directory">
          <xsd:annotation>
            <xsd:documentation>directory - DEPRECATED by RFC6350</xsd:documentation>
          </xsd:annotation>
        </xsd:enumeration>
        <xsd:enumeration value="text/ecmascript">
          <xsd:annotation>
            <xsd:documentation>ecmascript - OBSOLETED in favor of application/ecmascript</xsd:documentation>
          </xsd:annotation>
        </xsd:enumeration>
        <xsd:enumeration value="text/javascript">
          <xsd:annotation>
            <xsd:documentation>javascript - OBSOLETED in favor of application/javascript</xsd:documentation>
          </xsd:annotation>
        </xsd:enumeration>
        <xsd:enumeration value="text/vnd.si.uricatalogue">
          <xsd:annotation>
            <xsd:documentation>vnd.si.uricatalogue - OBSOLETED by request</xsd:documentation>
          </xsd:annotation>
        </xsd:enumeration>
      </xsd:restriction>
    </xsd:simpleType>
  </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>
